name: 2026-05-29 Political Commentary Corruption Tax Q1 GDP Collapse TH
description:
Q1 2026 PH GDP growth: 2.8%.
Q1 2025: 5.4%.

That's the corruption tax. Now booked into the national accounts.

Sino ba talaga ang nagbabayad?

The system protected itself. The contractors kept their margins. 118 million Filipinos absorbed the slowdown.

2026-05-07 PSA Q1 2026 GDP release: 2.8% YoY growth (weakest in 5 years post-pandemic), vs 5.4% in Q1 2025. Reporting across Rappler, GMA, Philstar, Inquirer, BusinessMirror attributes the slowdown to the flood control corruption scandal denting consumer/investor sentiment, alongside global oil shock and delays in the 2026 national budget rollout.
